equipment.name: Frost weapon횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: A melee weapon of the model gains +1 Strength.

equipment.name: Healing balm횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Narthecium" ability. Only for Chaplains.

equipment.name: Pelt of the Doublegangrel횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: A single enemy model in direct base contact suffers a cumulative -1 to hit penalty against the model.

equipment.name: Rune weapon횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: The model receives a +1 bonus to dispel psychic powers.

equipment.name: Tempest weapon횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: Enemy models that suffer at least one wound from this weapon must pass a Strength test or reduce their Initiative to 1 until the end of their next activation.

equipment.name: Thunderwolf mount
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" movement, +1 Strength, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, +1 Attack, and the "Bike" type. Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Wolf companion횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: The model may be joined by up to four Wolf companions. They do not prevent a model from joining another unit. The datasheet ist at the end of the codex.

equipment.name: Wolf helmet횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: All ranged weapons of the model gain the "Seeking" ability.

equipment.name: Wolftooth necklace횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Aegis(5+)" ability.

equipment.name: Blizzard shield
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry". Counts as a weapon selection. Only for Captain Dreadnoughts, Chaplain Dreadnoughts and Dreadnoughts.

equipment.name: Blizzard shield
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry". Counts as a weapon selection. Only for Captain Dreadnoughts, Chaplain Dreadnoughts and Dreadnoughts.
